sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, text_column String, num_column Int32);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'CLICKHOUSE is great'), (2, 'Clickhouse offers excellent performance'), (3, ''), (4, NULL);
CREATE TABLE another_table (key UInt32, foreign_key UInt32);
SELECT ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(text_column, 3, 6) AS hashes FROM test_table WHERE id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT foreign_key FROM another_table WHERE key = 1);
SELECT id, ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(text_column, 2, 4).1 AS min_hash FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING min_hash GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT hashnum FROM another_table) ORDER BY min_hash;
SELECT ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(NULLIF(text_column, ''), 3, 6) FROM test_table WHERE num_column GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT key FROM another_table) AND text_column IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(text_column, 5, 10) AS hashes FROM test_table WHERE id <= 3 AND text_column GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT text_column from test_table WHERE LENGTH(text_column) < 10) ORDER BY hashes.2 DESC;
